tools.name: submit_inquiry
tools.title: Submit inquiry
tools.description: Submit a contact or quote inquiry to COVAIMETALS. Saves the lead to the company's Google Sheet so the sales team can follow up.

name.description: Full name of the person inquiring.

phone.description: Contact phone number, including country code if available.

message.description: Details of the inquiry: products, sizes, quantities, use case, etc.

state.description: Optional Indian state of the buyer.

type.description: Kind of inquiry. Use 'quote' for pricing requests, otherwise 'contact'.

tools.name: list_products
tools.title: List COVAIMETALS products
tools.description: List all product categories and items COVAIMETALS supplies (PVC & UPVC ball valves, foot & check valves, taps, irrigation filters) with available sizes.
